title: Section 10
content: 1[Within six months] from the date of commencement of this Act, and subsequently at such times as may be considered necessary in this behalf by the administering authority, it shall, by notification in the Official Gazette, declare the parts of the offshore areas which shall be available for grant of 2[reconnaissance permit, or exploration licence, or composite licence, or production lease]. 3[* * * * *]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 17 of 2023, s. 8, for "(1) Within six months" (w.e.f. 17-8-2023). 2. Subs. by s. 8, ibid., for "reconnaissance permit, exploration licence or production lease" (w.e.f. 17-8-2023). 3. Sub-section (2) and (3) omitted by s. 8, ibid. (w.e.f. 17-8-2023).
